stories.title: Air raid sirens blare during Eid call to prayer in Kuwait
stories.summary: Iran launched missiles and drones at US assets while air raid sirens interrupted Eid prayers in Kuwait City.

stories.title: Israel strikes Syria after Druze clashes
stories.summary: Israel bombed Syrian weapons sites and government infrastructure after clashes involving the Druze community, prompting Syria to call the strikes an assault on sovereignty.

stories.title: ‘Cowards’: Trump slams NATO over lack of support in US–Israel war on Iran
stories.summary: Trump is demanding NATO allies help secure the Strait of Hormuz while the alliance relocates personnel from Iraq.

stories.title: Switzerland announces halt to weapons exports to US amid Iran war
stories.summary: Switzerland halted weapons exports to the US and closed its airspace to US military flights linked to the Iran war.

stories.title: US easing ban on Iranian oil would signal ‘beginning of the end of war’
stories.summary: The US is considering lifting sanctions on Iranian oil stranded on tankers at sea, which officials say could signal the "beginning of the end" of the war.

stories.title: US considering occupying Kharg Island to force Iran to open Hormuz strait, say reports
stories.summary: Reports claim Trump is considering occupying Iran's Kharg Island to force Tehran to reopen the Hormuz strait, potentially reversing his "no boots on the ground" stance.

stories.title: Iran video said to show US F-35 being hit
stories.summary: Iran released military video purportedly showing its air defenses hitting a US F-35 fighter jet.

stories.title: ‘The saddest day for Muslim worshippers in Jerusalem’: al-Aqsa mosque closed at Eid
stories.summary: Israeli authorities closed al-Aqsa mosque for the first time since 1967, forcing hundreds of Palestinian worshippers to hold Eid prayers outside the sealed site.

stories.title: Father of killed US military member disputes Hegseth’s claim he said to ‘finish’ the job in Iran
stories.summary: The father of a US service member killed in a tanker crash contradicted Defense Secretary Hegseth's claim that families told him to "finish the job" in Iran.

stories.title: Iran’s IRGC says spokesman Ali Mohammad Naini killed in US-Israeli attack
stories.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards confirmed that spokesman Ali Mohammad Naini was killed in US-Israeli airstrikes as the assassination campaign against Iranian leadership continues.

stories.title: Zelenskyy sends a delegation to US to seek resumption of Russia-Ukraine talks
stories.summary: Zelensky sent a delegation to the US seeking to resume Russia-Ukraine peace talks while America is distracted by the Iran war.

stories.title: Slovenia heads to polls with diverging views on Israel in focus
stories.summary: Slovenia heads to elections with the center-left coalition facing off against populist right-wing parties amid claims of foreign interference and diverging views on Israel.

stories.title: Israel says it hit Syrian army camps in the south after Druze ‘attacked’
stories.summary: Israel struck Syrian army camps in the south after alleged attacks on Druze communities in Suwayda province.
